construct_verdict_reason: All four items directly measure beliefs about the instrumental value (employment, income) and social value (societal well-being) of education, as well as overall perceived worthwhileness of studying.

items.reason: Directly measures overall belief in the worthwhileness of education, which is a core component of the construct.
Measures belief that education improves employment prospects, a key instrumental value of education.
Measures belief that education improves income, a key instrumental value of education.
Measures belief that education contributes to societal well-being, a key social value of education.
